parameters.query:
WITH metrics AS (
  SELECT 'total_opportunities' as metric, COUNT(*)::numeric as val FROM gda_opportunity_alerts
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'pipeline_value', COUNT(*)::numeric * 50 FROM gda_opportunity_alerts WHERE urgency='HIGH'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'active_alerts', COUNT(*)::numeric FROM gda_opportunity_alerts WHERE expires_at > NOW()
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'action_items_open', COUNT(*)::numeric FROM gda_action_items WHERE status != 'done'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'intel_log_entries', COUNT(*)::numeric FROM gda_intelligence_log
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'opp_tracker_depts', COUNT(*)::numeric FROM gda_opportunity_tracker
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'competitor_cache', COUNT(*)::numeric FROM gda_competitor_cache
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'saved_opportunities', COUNT(*)::numeric FROM gda_saved_opportunities
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'departments_tracked', COUNT(DISTINCT dept)::numeric FROM gda_opportunity_tracker
)
SELECT * FROM metrics;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gda_trend_arrays (
  metric_name VARCHAR(100) PRIMARY KEY,
  spark_data JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',
  latest_value NUMERIC,
  delta_pct NUMERIC,
  trend_direction VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'flat',
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);

WITH recent AS (
  SELECT metric_name,
    json_agg(metric_value ORDER BY date) as spark_data,
    (array_agg(metric_value ORDER BY date DESC))[1] as latest,
    (array_agg(metric_value ORDER BY date DESC))[2] as previous
  FROM daily_trends
  WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - 7
  GROUP BY metric_name
)
INSERT INTO gda_trend_arrays (metric_name, spark_data, latest_value, delta_pct, trend_direction, updated_at)
SELECT
  r.metric_name,
  r.spark_data::jsonb,
  r.latest,
  CASE WHEN r.previous > 0 THEN ROUND(((r.latest - r.previous) / r.previous * 100)::numeric, 1) ELSE 0 END,
  CASE
    WHEN r.latest > r.previous THEN 'up'
    WHEN r.latest < r.previous THEN 'down'
    ELSE 'flat'
  END,
  NOW()
FROM recent r
ON CONFLICT (metric_name) DO UPDATE SET
  spark_data = EXCLUDED.spark_data,
  latest_value = EXCLUDED.latest_value,
  delta_pct = EXCLUDED.delta_pct,
  trend_direction = EXCLUDED.trend_direction,
  updated_at = NOW();
